channel.title: Posts on Evan Samsky
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Evan Samsky

item.title: Learning Python after R
item.description: R vs Python? Some say both, This website and a lot of the content on it comes from my experience taking Computational Biology and Bioinformatics (SDS348) at UT Austin with Professor Woodward in Fall 2020. During the semester we focused a lot on using R to do data wrangling, visualization, and analysis, but we also covered a lot about Python. R is a programming language that’s used for data analysis for economists, academics, and people who love its unique set of packages that add onto its capabilities.
